sectiondef.header: Indexes for the cells in the devicetree bosch,mram-cfg property

description.para: These match the description of the cells in the bosch,m_can-base devicetree binding.

briefdescription.para: offset cell index
std-filter-elements cell index
ext-filter-elements cell index
rx-fifo0-elements cell index
rx-fifo1-elements cell index
rx-buffer-elements cell index
tx-event-fifo-elements cell index
tx-buffer-elements cell index
Total number of cells in bosch,mram-cfg property.
Get the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM offset.

simplesect.para: the Message RAM offset in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the number of standard (11-bit) filter elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of standard (11-bit) filter elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of extended (29-bit) filter elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of extended (29-bit) filter elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of Rx FIFO 0 elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of Rx FIFO 0 elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of Rx FIFO 1 elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of Rx FIFO 1 elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of Rx Buffer elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of Rx Buffer elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of Tx Event FIFO elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of Tx Event FIFO elements

briefdescription.para: Get the number of Tx Buffer elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the number of Tx Buffer elements

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of standard (11-bit) filter elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of standard (11-bit) filter elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of extended (29-bit) filter elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of extended (29-bit) filter elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of Rx FIFO 0 elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx FIFO 0 elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of Rx FIFO 1 elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx FIFO 1 elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of Rx Buffer elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx Buffer elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of Tx Event FIFO elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of Tx Event FIFO elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the base offset of Tx Buffer elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the base offset of Tx Buffer elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Get the Bosch M_CAN register base address.

detaileddescription.para: For devicetree nodes with just one register block, this macro returns the base address of that register block.
If a devicetree node has more than one register block, this macros returns the base address of the register block named "m_can".

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN register base address

briefdescription.para: Get the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM base address.

detaileddescription.para: For devicetree nodes with dedicated Message RAM area defined via devicetree, this macro returns the base address of the Message RAM.

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM base address (MRBA)

briefdescription.para: Get the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM address.

detaileddescription.para: For devicetree nodes with dedicated Message RAM area defined via devicetree, this macro returns the address of the Message RAM, taking in the Message RAM offset into account.

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM address

briefdescription.para: Get the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM size.

detaileddescription.para: For devicetree nodes with dedicated Message RAM area defined via devicetree, this macro returns the size of the Message RAM, taking in the Message RAM offset into account.

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM base address

briefdescription.para: Get the total size of all Bosch M_CAN Message RAM elements.

simplesect.para: the total size of all Message RAM elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Define a RAM buffer for Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: For devicetree nodes without dedicated Message RAM area, this macro defines a suitable RAM buffer to hold the Message RAM elements. Since this buffer cannot be shared between multiple Bosch M_CAN instances, the Message RAM offset must be set to 0x0.

memberdef.name: CAN_MCAN_DT_BUILD_ASSERT_MRAM_CFG
memberdef.initializer: BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_STD_FILTER_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 128, \ "Maximum Standard filter elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_EXT_FILTER_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 64, \ "Maximum Extended filter elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO0_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 64, \ "Maximum Rx FIFO 0 elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO1_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 64, \ "Maximum Rx FIFO 1 elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_BUFFER_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 64, \ "Maximum Rx Buffer elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_EVENT_FIFO_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 32, \ "Maximum Tx Buffer elements exceeded"); \ BUILD_ASSERT(CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_BUFFER_ELEMENTS(node_id) <= 32, \ "Maximum Tx Buffer elements exceeded");

briefdescription.para: Assert that the Message RAM configuration meets the Bosch M_CAN IP core restrictions.
Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the Message RAM offset in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_STD_FILTER_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of standard (11-bit) elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_EXT_FILTER_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of extended (29-bit) elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO0_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of Rx FIFO 0 elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO1_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of Rx FIFO 1 elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_BUFFER_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of Rx Buffer elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_EVENT_FIFO_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of Tx Event FIFO elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_BUFFER_ELEMENTS(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the number of Tx Buffer elements

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_STD_FILTER_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of standard (11-bit) filter elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_EXT_FILTER_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of extended (29-bit) filter elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO0_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx FIFO 0 elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_FIFO1_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx FIFO 1 elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_RX_BUFFER_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of Rx Buffer elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_EVENT_FIFO_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of Tx Event FIFO elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_TX_BUFFER_OFFSET(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the base offset of Tx Buffer elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MCAN_ADDR(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN register base address

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRBA(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM Base Address (MRBA)

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_ADDR(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM address

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_SIZE(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the Bosch M_CAN Message RAM size in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_ELEMENTS_SIZE(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

simplesect.para: the total size of all Message RAM elements in bytes

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_DEFINE(DT_DRV_INST(inst))
Bosch M_CAN specific static initializer for a minimum nominal can_timing struct.
Bosch M_CAN specific static initializer for a maximum nominal can_timing struct.
Bosch M_CAN specific static initializer for a minimum data phase can_timing struct.
Bosch M_CAN specific static initializer for a maximum data phase can_timing struct.
Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_BUILD_ASSERT_MRAM_CFG(DT_DRV_INST(inst))

memberdef.name: CAN_MCAN_CALLBACKS_DEFINE
memberdef.initializer: static struct can_mcan_tx_callback _name##_tx_cbs[_tx]; \ static struct can_mcan_rx_callback _name##_std_cbs[_std]; \ static struct can_mcan_rx_callback _name##_ext_cbs[_ext]; \ static const struct can_mcan_callbacks _name = { \ .tx = _name##_tx_cbs, \ .std = _name##_std_cbs, \ .ext = _name##_ext_cbs, \ .num_tx = _tx, \ .num_std = _std, \ .num_ext = _ext, \ }

briefdescription.para: Define Bosch M_CAN TX and RX callbacks.

detaileddescription.para: This macro allows a Bosch M_CAN driver frontend using a fixed Message RAM configuration to limit the required software resources (e.g. limit the number of the standard (11-bit) or extended (29-bit) filters in use).
Frontend drivers supporting dynamic Message RAM configuration should use CAN_MCAN_DT_CALLBACKS_DEFINE() or CAN_MCAN_DT_INST_CALLBACKS_DEFINE() instead.

briefdescription.para: Define Bosch M_CAN TX and RX callbacks.
Equivalent to CAN_MCAN_DT_CALLBACKS_DEFINE(DT_DRV_INST(inst))
Get an array containing the number of elements in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: The order of the array entries is given by the CAN_MCAN_MRAM_CFG definitions.

simplesect.para: array of number of elements

briefdescription.para: Get an array containing the base offsets for element in Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: The order of the array entries is given by the CAN_MCAN_MRAM_CFG definitions.

simplesect.para: array of base offsets for elements

memberdef.name: CAN_MCAN_DT_CONFIG_GET
memberdef.initializer: { \ .common = CAN_DT_DRIVER_CONFIG_GET(node_id, 0, 1000000), \ .ops = _ops, \ .callbacks = _cbs, \ .mram_elements = CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_ELEMENTS_GET(node_id), \ .mram_offsets = CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_OFFSETS_GET(node_id), \ .mram_size = CAN_MCAN_DT_MRAM_ELEMENTS_SIZE(node_id), \ .custom = _custom, \ COND_CODE_1(IS_ENABLED(CONFIG_CAN_RX_TIMESTAMP), \ (.timestamp_prescaler = DT_PROP(node_id, bosch_timestamp_counter_prescaler),), ()) \ }

briefdescription.para: Static initializer for can_mcan_config struct.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to custom driver frontend configuration structure

briefdescription.para: Static initializer for can_mcan_config struct from DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to custom driver frontend configuration structure

briefdescription.para: Initializer for a can_mcan_data struct.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to custom driver frontend data structure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* can_mcan_read_reg_t) (const struct device *dev, uint16_t reg, uint32_t *val)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_read_reg_t

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback for reading a register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* can_mcan_write_reg_t) (const struct device *dev, uint16_t reg, uint32_t val)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint16_t reg, uint32_t val)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_write_reg_t

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback for writing a register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* can_mcan_read_mram_t) (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, void *dst, size_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, void *dst, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_read_mram_t

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback for reading from Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Destination for the data read. The destination address must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to read. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* can_mcan_write_mram_t) (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, const void *src, size_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, const void *src, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_write_mram_t

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback for writing to Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Source for the data to be written. The source address must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to write. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* can_mcan_clear_mram_t) (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, size_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_clear_mram_t

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback for clearing Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: Clear Message RAM by writing 0 to all words.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to clear. Must be a multiple of 4.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper for reading a memory mapped register.

parameterdescription.para: Memory mapped register read always succeeds.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper for writing a memory mapped register.

parameterdescription.para: Memory mapped register write always succeeds.

memberdef.argsstring: (mem_addr_t base, uint16_t offset, void *dst, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_sys_read_mram

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper for reading from memory mapped Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The base address must be 32-bit aligned.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Destination for the data read. The destination address must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to read. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.argsstring: (mem_addr_t base, uint16_t offset, const void *src, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_sys_write_mram

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper for writing to memory mapped Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The base address must be 32-bit aligned.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Source for the data to be written. The source address must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to write. Must be a multiple of 4.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper for clearing memory mapped Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: Clear Message RAM by writing 0 to all words.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The base address must be 32-bit aligned.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to clear. Must be a multiple of 4.

briefdescription.para: Read a Bosch M_CAN register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t reg, uint32_t val)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_write_reg

briefdescription.para: Write a Bosch M_CAN register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, void *dst, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_read_mram

briefdescription.para: Read from Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to read. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, const void *src, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_write_mram

briefdescription.para: Write to Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Source for the data to be written
Number of bytes to write. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t offset, size_t len)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_clear_mram

briefdescription.para: Clear Bosch M_CAN Message RAM.

detaileddescription.para: Clear Message RAM by writing 0 to all words.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Offset from the start of the Message RAM for the given Bosch M_CAN instance. The offset must be 32-bit aligned.
Number of bytes to clear. Must be a multiple of 4.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uintptr_t mrba, uintptr_t mram)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_configure_mram

briefdescription.para: Configure Bosch M_MCAN Message RAM start addresses.

detaileddescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver front-end callback helper function for configuring the start addresses of the Bosch M_CAN Rx FIFO0 (RXFOC), Rx FIFO1 (RXF1C), Rx Buffer (RXBCC), Tx Buffer (TXBC), and Tx Event FIFO (TXEFC) in Message RAM.
The start addresses (containing bits 15:2 since Bosch M_CAN message RAM is accessed as 32 bit words) are calculated relative to the provided Message RAM Base Address (mrba).

Some Bosch M_CAN implementations use a fixed Message RAM configuration, other use a fixed memory area and relative addressing, others again have custom registers for configuring the Message RAM. It is the responsibility of the front-end driver to call this function during driver initialization as needed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver initialization callback.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver m_can_int0 IRQ handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver m_can_int1 IRQ handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Enable Bosch M_CAN configuration change.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon getting CAN controller capabilities See can_get_capabilities() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon starting CAN controller See can_start() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon stopping CAN controller See can_stop() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon setting CAN controller mode See can_set_mode() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon setting CAN bus timing See can_set_timing() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon setting CAN bus data phase timing See can_set_timing_data() for argument description.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct can_frame *frame, k_timeout_t timeout, can_tx_callback_t callback, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_send

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, can_rx_callback_t callback, void *user_data, const struct can_filter *filter)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_add_rx_filter

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon adding an RX filter See can_add_rx_callback() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon removing an RX filter See can_remove_rx_filter() for argument description.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum can_state *state, struct can_bus_err_cnt *err_cnt)
memberdef.name: can_mcan_get_state

briefdescription.para: Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon getting the CAN controller state See can_get_state() for argument description.
Bosch M_CAN driver callback API upon setting a state change callback See can_set_state_change_callback() for argument description.
